name: stems-to-mixdown
description: Sum a folder of multitrack stems into a stereo listening master at the highest quality the source honestly supports. Default output is normalized to -14 LUFS-I / -1 dBTP (the 2025–2026 streaming consensus); --archival preserves the v1.2 unity-sum behavior bit-for-bit. One-shot run.py orchestrator chains identify → analyze → plan → mix → verify, auto-detects master files alongside the stems, and descends into a single nested audio dir without prompting. Codec-driven lossy detection (ALAC-in-m4a stays lossless). Reference bundle stays unity-sum for null tests. Twenty commandments, every refusal cited.
